site.title: Large Format Graphics & Murals | ION Print & Promo
site.description: Wall murals, window graphics & floor decals for offices, storefronts & public spaces. Custom large format graphics designed, printed & installed by experienced local professionals.

hero.title: Graphics & Murals
hero.imageAlt: Custom wall murals and large format graphics

centreText.title: Transform Your Space
centreText.description: Transform your space with fabulous decals & mural designs. From full wall murals to subtle window & floor decals, we help you create environments that look polished, on-brand & easy to navigate.

featureImage.imageAlt: Custom large format wall mural installation

features.title: Wall Murals, Decals & Office Branding
features.description:
Make your walls work for you. Whether it's a bold feature wall or clean, consistent branding throughout your space, wall graphics create impact the moment someone walks in.

  • Custom wall murals for full coverage or feature walls
  • Wall decals & vinyl lettering
  • Office branding graphics & logo walls
  • Motivational or informational wall designs

Let us help you define your environment with style. We print everything in-house at our Barrie location.

features.title: Window Graphics & Storefront Visibility
features.description:
Your windows are valuable space! Use them to increase visibility, get found, display business hours, add privacy & reduce the impact of direct sunlight without making permanent changes.

  • Window decals & full window graphics
  • Perforated window film to see out, not in
  • Frosted & privacy vinyl
  • Sun-reducing films to help cut glare & heat
  • Seasonal, holiday or promotional window signage

We design, print & install window graphics that help your storefront, office or public space look polished & professional.

features.title: Floor Graphics & Wayfinding
features.description:
Floor graphics are a smart, often overlooked way to guide customers & communicate key messages in busy spaces.

  • Directional & wayfinding floor decals
  • Safety messaging & instructional graphics
  • Branded floor graphics for events & retail spaces

Designed with durability & slip-resistance in mind, these graphics hold up in high-traffic areas while staying clear & easy to read.
